stages.purpose: Identify the authoritative organization and distinguish it from the distractor.

arguments.query: site:heatherby-natural-history.fixture Morrow Creek meteorite catalog accession

stages.purpose: Use the resolved organization to locate a primary document for the requested fact.
Read the primary document itself rather than treating a snippet as evidence.

response_constraints: Cite the fetched primary-source URL rather than a search-results page.
Treat search snippets as navigation aids, not final evidence.
Separate sourced facts from any inference.
Return exactly `Morrow Creek meteorite | accession HMNH-2024-071 | https://fixtures.example/heatherby-natural-history/catalog/morrow-creek`.
Include no heading, explanation, or inferred acquisition date.

prompt: Identify the authoritative museum for the Heatherby meteorite collection, then fetch its primary catalog entry for the Morrow Creek meteorite. Reply exactly `Morrow Creek meteorite | accession <ID> | <source URL>` and include no other text.

results.title: Official site — Heatherby Museum of Natural History

fetch_1.title: Catalog Record: Morrow Creek Meteorite
fetch_1.content: The Morrow Creek meteorite is cataloged under accession HMNH-2024-071. It was acquired from the county survey collection.
